hero.subtitle: From civil logistics to emergency response — built for every critical mission.

civil-logistics.title: Civil Logistic
civil-logistics.label: Civil Logistic
civil-logistics.desc: Provides systematic solutions for typical operation scenarios such as trunk logistics, branch logistics and terminal logistics.

emergency-rescue.title: Emergency Rescue
emergency-rescue.label: Emergency Rescue
emergency-rescue.desc: Innovate the UAVs emergency rescue mode. Build an intelligent three-dimensional rescue system. Provide systematic solutions for different disaster scenarios.

industry-service.title: Industry Service
industry-service.label: Industry Service
industry-service.desc: A complete operational system for flight carrying. Provide customers with services such as operation, testing, and carrying of various models.

forest-fire-prevention.title: Forest & Grassland Fire Prevention
forest-fire-prevention.label: Fire Prevention
forest-fire-prevention.desc: Comprehensive forest and grassland fire prevention system including daily patrol, fire monitoring, fire scene reconnaissance, and emergency communications support.

cta.subtitle: Our specialists design UAV solutions tailored to your operational requirements.
